ConstructorArguments:
Provides static methods for displaying various modal overlays in the game UI.
The Sandbox.Game.Overlay class allows you to open modals for packages, maps, news, organizations, reviews, friends lists, server lists, settings, input bindings, and player profiles. It serves as a central point for invoking user interface overlays that interact with core game and community features.

Documentation.Summary:
Provides static methods for displaying various modal overlays in the game UI.
<para>
The <see cref="T:Sandbox.Game.Overlay" /> class allows you to open modals for packages, maps, news, organizations, reviews, friends lists, server lists, settings, input bindings, and player profiles.
It serves as a central point for invoking user interface overlays that interact with core game and community features.
</para>
Examples: // Show a modal for a specific game package Game.Overlay.ShowGameModal("facepunch.sandbox"); // Check if any overlay is currently open if (Game.Overlay.IsOpen) { // Pause game logic or input }
